description_long: This object is a white dimpled golf ball mounted on a slender, tapered golf tee. The golf ball features a uniform pattern of small, round dimples across its entire surface, which are designed to optimize aerodynamics during flight. On one side of the ball, there is visible branding text in black and pink, reading 'TOP FLITE XL 2000', with a small pink ribbon above the text. The golf tee is cylindrical, narrowing to a point at the bottom, and has printed text along its shaft. The overall appearance is clean and pristine, with no visible signs of wear or damage. The object is typically used in outdoor sports settings such as golf courses, but may also be found in urban parks or recreational areas.
description: A white dimpled golf ball with 'TOP FLITE XL 2000' branding sits atop a slender golf tee, both appearing clean and unused.
description_view_0: Front view showing the golf ball's branding and pink ribbon, with the tee's text visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the dimple pattern and the back of the ball, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the branding text 'TOP FLITE XL 2000' clearly visible, tee text less prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the dimpled surface of the ball and the plain tee, with no visible branding.
attribute_brand_logo: Text 'TOP FLITE XL 2000' with a pink ribbon above, located on the front of the golf ball, in black and pink.
attribute_sport-specific_markings: Uniform dimple pattern covering the ball's surface; branding text 'TOP FLITE XL 2000' and a pink ribbon on one side in black and pink.
